creator: seggers@semyam.dinoco.de
text:
The list of mailinglists in the handbook is outdated regarding
the many cvs log mailing lists.  According to what I read on -current
the many small ones don't exists anymore (not verified) and are
replaced by the existing cvs-all.

	Also there is at least cvs-all-digest (maybe others have a
digest counterpart, too) which is not listed in the handbook.
